# MDE v1.5.15

## Features

- Added the Automation Center runtime foundation with workspace automation-flow discovery, flow editing, projection, scheduler/runtime lifecycle, persisted run state, runtime ownership coordination, evidence/report storage, and Agent CLI capability checks.
- Added an editor Agent Chat panel backed by Codex app-server sessions. The panel supports Codex availability gating, streaming send/stop lifecycle, native session listing and resume, current document context, safe image attachments, changed-file summaries, diagnostics, and Codex-only entry visibility.
- Added the private `@mde/automation-flow` and `@mde/agent-chat` workspace packages for automation-flow parsing/projection and Agent Chat runtime/session behavior.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed real Codex app-server initialization so Agent Chat sends the JSON-RPC `initialize` request and `initialized` notification before business methods such as `thread/start` and `thread/list`.
- Fixed Agent Chat entry visibility on machines where Codex protocol type generation is slow enough to exceed the previous readiness timing.
- Fixed duplicate pasted image chips and stale selected-session previews in the Agent Chat panel.
- Hardened Agent Chat diagnostics so renderer-facing errors use generic localized text instead of raw host details.
- Fixed successful Agent Chat sends that could still show a generic diagnostic when changed-file capture was unavailable.
- Fixed Agent Chat composer feedback so submitted messages clear immediately, show a thinking state while the turn is running, and do not keep stale attachment chips after submit.
- Fixed Agent Chat session labels so native Codex session titles appear in the picker instead of id-only labels when titles are available.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for Automation Center runtime/window behavior and Agent Chat IPC, preload, renderer, package, Codex adapter, context, attachments, history, changed-files, and component-id contracts.
- Added package-local lint, typecheck, and test coverage for `@mde/automation-flow` and `@mde/agent-chat`.
- Updated workspace version metadata to `1.5.15`.

## Documentation

- Added Chinese user manual coverage for Automation Center.
- Updated the Chinese AI manual, troubleshooting guide, manual index, and component-name reference for Agent Chat, send-state behavior, native session titles, and its new stable component ids.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow test`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat test`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/agent-chat lint`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:e2e:agent-chat`
- Real Codex smoke: Agent Chat button appeared, `Reply with exactly OK.` returned `OK`, and a UI-selected PNG attachment returned `IMAGE OK`.

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow. Without optional signing/notarization secrets, these artifacts are unsigned.
- Windows NSIS artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow when the Windows release job is enabled.
